query: SELECT serviceCode, nameAr, sortOrder FROM lifecycle_services WHERE stageCode = (SELECT stageCode FROM lifecycle_stages ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 1) ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT serviceCode, nameAr, sortOrder FROM lifecycle_services WHERE stageCode = (SELECT stageCode FROM lifecycle_stages ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 1) ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 20;
